#Lithium geopolitics in one chart.

- China consumes ~87% of mined lithium
- Japan + Korea ~10%
- US + Europe <3%

The real control point isn’t the mine. It’s refining, CAM, and cell manufacturing.

Without downstream capacity, raw material “security” remains theoretical.
